news.t: Horizon Kinetics Launches Blockchain Development Exchange Traded Fund (BCDF)

holdings.infoBox: BCDF is an equity ETF with a total of 38 individual holdings. The top holdings are Cboe Global Markets stock at 7.66%, US BANK MMDA - USBGFS 7 at 7.41%, Singapore Exchange at 7.11%, Urbana at 6.86%, and TMX Group at 5.42%.

overview.description: The Horizon Kinetics Blockchain Development ETF (BCDF) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is actively managed to broadly invest in blockchain development companies of any market capitalization from around the world. BCDF was launched on Aug 1, 2022 and is issued by Horizon Kinetics.

data.title: Horizon Kinetics Launches Blockchain Development Exchange Traded Fund (BCDF)
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $BCDF--Horizon Kinetics Launches Blockchain Development Exchange Traded Fund (BCDF)
